//: node-pg-migrate config (D20). Loaded explicitly via `--config-file` from the root `migrate` script (v7 does NOT auto-discover this filename). Keys are the CLI long-option names (kebab-case) that node-pg-migrate's readJson understands. The migrations ALWAYS run on the UNPOOLED direct Neon host: the DSN env var is named on the CLI (`--database-url-var DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED`) because a value placed here would be treated as a literal DSN, not an env-var name. Session-level DDL must never traverse PgBouncer. Migration FILES are owned by @mailmetero/db. Invoked as `pnpm migrate up` (web.preDeployCommand).
